items.title: Playing with GPT Chat
items.summary: Exploring the coding based opportunities of GPT Chat
items.content_text: After seeing some mention of what GPT Chat could do I decided that it would be a good idea to have a play with it myself, I had heard that it was able to generate code and I wanted to see how usable this feature would be.Starting with a simple description of what I was looking for the AI produced something that I didn’t expect actual code it wasn’t the best quality but asking for further refinements improved the quality it formatted the python code I asked for too pep8 but it was still inefficent. I was trying to get it to write a program that would sort photos by date and put them into dated files, what I found was the more specific my request the better the result in the end I didn’t end up with working code but it was very close to being a working solution.Looking at the code it produced it’s easy to see defficencys but this wasn’t what the program was designed to do, no matter how hard I tried I couldn’t make it add efficencies that I had tested and knew were more efficent. While I dont think us software engineers have anything to worry about it is intresting technology and one day could become more useful.Following this I have decided to trial GitHub Copilot I dismissed it as marketing hype at the time and paid limited attention to it asuming it was for poor programers or beginers but their could be benifit I didn’t see I will no doubt write another post when I have trialed GitHub Copilot
items.content_html:
After seeing some mention of what GPT Chat could do I decided that it would be a good idea to have a play with it myself, I had heard that it was able to generate code and I wanted to see how usable this feature would be.

Starting with a simple description of what I was looking for the AI produced something that I didn’t expect actual code it wasn’t the best quality but asking for further refinements improved the quality it formatted the python code I asked for too pep8 but it was still inefficent. I was trying to get it to write a program that would sort photos by date and put them into dated files, what I found was the more specific my request the better the result in the end I didn’t end up with working code but it was very close to being a working solution.

Looking at the code it produced it’s easy to see defficencys but this wasn’t what the program was designed to do, no matter how hard I tried I couldn’t make it add efficencies that I had tested and knew were more efficent. While I dont think us software engineers have anything to worry about it is intresting technology and one day could become more useful.

Following this I have decided to trial GitHub Copilot I dismissed it as marketing hype at the time and paid limited attention to it asuming it was for poor programers or beginers but their could be benifit I didn’t see I will no doubt write another post when I have trialed GitHub Copilot

items.title: Hello and welcome
items.summary: An introduction to who i am and what i do.
items.content_text: Hello and welcome to my blog I’m lara now let me tell you a bit about myself. I live and work in the uk, i work for a motorsport team as a software engineer and love every second of it, dont get me wrong it’s hard work but I love it. Away from work I have lots of intrests that keep me occupied I like playing with new software ideas so you will no doubt see this in some of my posts on the site, sometimes this follows over into small electronics projects.I am not all about software I have other intrests like building and flying FPV drones and planes, mountin biking no massive jumps just natrual trails in my local area getting out into nature and just having a good time. This is not all like any girl I love to shop mostly online but ocationaly in person this is something I find dificult as I also have autism and find lots of social situations confusing I am very fortunate to be where I am.Further to the above I like taking photos curently have a big DSLR but it’s a little much for me now so looking to trade down to a decent all in one that fits in my bag and dosen’t weight a ton to lug around. Sorting and organising is also a something I enjoy, I find that quite relaxing most of the time. I couldn’t end without saying I’m also a gamer not a good one but I realy enjoy a good narative in single player games.
items.content_html:
Hello and welcome to my blog I’m lara now let me tell you a bit about myself. I live and work in the uk, i work for a motorsport team as a software engineer and love every second of it, dont get me wrong it’s hard work but I love it. Away from work I have lots of intrests that keep me occupied I like playing with new software ideas so you will no doubt see this in some of my posts on the site, sometimes this follows over into small electronics projects.

I am not all about software I have other intrests like building and flying FPV drones and planes, mountin biking no massive jumps just natrual trails in my local area getting out into nature and just having a good time. This is not all like any girl I love to shop mostly online but ocationaly in person this is something I find dificult as I also have autism and find lots of social situations confusing I am very fortunate to be where I am.

Further to the above I like taking photos curently have a big DSLR but it’s a little much for me now so looking to trade down to a decent all in one that fits in my bag and dosen’t weight a ton to lug around. Sorting and organising is also a something I enjoy, I find that quite relaxing most of the time. I couldn’t end without saying I’m also a gamer not a good one but I realy enjoy a good narative in single player games.
